{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Cascade bombs
| introduced = cradle-11-dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Cascade bombs]] are weapons that can crack and kill central planets.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c6">''Dreadgod'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
